name: 藏鏡人的推理影片：我的二代同事
description: 描述一位看似平凡的職場同事，實際上是公司董事長千金的趣味反轉故事。

narrative.structure: 起：名車下車建立富二代懸念；承：展現日常勤奮工作與名牌包反差；轉：同事詢問住家空間與工資來源；合：揭曉爸爸是董事長的真相。
narrative.summary: 旁白介紹一位家境優渥卻極度低調勤奮的同事，最後透過對話揭露該同事其實是自家公司接班人的反轉真相。

hook.description: 我有個同事是二代，他家一天的收入比我年薪還多。

structure.action: {character} steps out of a luxury black off-road vehicle.
structure.purpose: Establish the wealthy background of the character.

structure.action: A fast montage of the automated production line in {scene}.
structure.purpose: Show the scale of the family business.

structure.action: {character} working at a messy desk with documents.
structure.purpose: Contrast wealth with hardworking daily life.

structure.action: {character} answering the phone in the office.
Colleague points at {product} and mentions its high price.
{character} lying on the desk talking about living with family in {scene}.
structure.purpose: Build up to the final reveal through dialogue.

structure.action: {character} reveals that her father is the chairman with {emotion}.
structure.purpose: Deliver the final twist and punchline.

visualFlow.rhythmPattern: Rapid cuts in the beginning, slowing down for dialogue at the end.

promptTemplate.base: High-quality short video style, realistic lighting, vibrant colors, {style}.
perShot: {character} getting out of a black SUV in {scene}, {style}.
Wide shot of an industrial {scene} with machinery, {style}.
{character} busy working at a desk in {scene} with {emotion} expression.
Close-up of {character} using a phone in {scene}, {style}.
{character} resting on a desk in {scene} with a {emotion} look.
Extreme close-up of {character} smiling with {emotion} in {scene}.

useCase: Workplace humor and brand storytelling for high-end products or corporate image.

analysis.whyItWorks: It uses the 'undercover boss' trope combined with a relatable workplace setting and a sharp comedic twist.
analysis.targetAudience: Office workers, young adults, people interested in luxury lifestyles.
replicableElements: The 3-second hook starting with wealth contrast
Use of high-end props to hint at identity
